sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Juggling
special_mechanics.description: System where opponents can be knocked into the air and followed up with combination attacks while airborne and defenseless. Noted as a game innovation.

special_mechanics.name: Blocking Damage
special_mechanics.description: Characters take a small amount of damage from regular moves while blocking. Blocking characters lose very little ground when struck.

special_mechanics.name: Uppercut
special_mechanics.description: Attack that knocks the enemy high into the air and causes much damage. Available as shared move across all player characters.

tier_notes: Tier 1 data is qualitative only. Available documentation covers game mechanics and history but does not include specific physics parameters like gravity values, jump heights, velocity measurements, or sub-pixel precision. Sources provide gameplay mechanic descriptions but lack technical movement data.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Mortal Kombat (SNES)
